name: American Express SmartEarn Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹40,000 or more in the previous year to earn bonus MR points worth more than the fee

categoryRates.description: 10X Membership Rewards on Amazon, Flipkart, and Uber
5X Membership Rewards on all other online spends
1 Membership Reward point per ₹50 on offline purchases

welcomeBenefits.condition: On first spend within 30 days of card issuance

additionalBenefits: 10X rewards on top e-commerce platforms (Amazon, Flipkart)
Amex Offers - exclusive merchant deals and cashback
Smart Spend summary for expense tracking
pros: 10X rewards on Amazon and Flipkart is excellent for online shoppers
5X on all online spends makes it strong for digital payments
Access to Amex Offers and merchant deals
cons: Low base earn rate of 1 MR/₹50 on offline spends
Amex acceptance is limited at some Indian merchants
idealFor: Frequent online shoppers on Amazon and Flipkart
Users looking for an affordable entry into the Amex ecosystem

faqs.question: How does the 10X reward work?
faqs.answer: When you shop on Amazon, Flipkart, or Uber, you earn 10 Membership Reward points per ₹50 instead of the regular 1 point. This is capped at 1,500 bonus points per month.

faqs.question: Is Amex widely accepted in India?
faqs.answer: Amex acceptance has improved significantly but may still be limited at some smaller merchants. It works well at major retail chains, online platforms, and most restaurants.

faqs.question: Can I use this card for UPI payments?
faqs.answer: Amex cards do not support UPI payments. You can use the card for direct online payments and at POS terminals where Amex is accepted.
